subcodes.first_line: My Supreme Pen beareth witness unto My Most Glorious Self that verily He is the Truth, there is none other God but Him. He doth witness and behold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یشهد قلمی الاعلی لنفسی الابهی انه هو الحق لا اله الا هو یشهد و یری و هو
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement
